cols.description: Column span for the base (xs-and-up) breakpoint: 1–12, `"auto"` to fit content, or `"n/total"` for a custom total. Falsy = equal-width fill.

sm.description: Span from the sm breakpoint up.

md.description: Span from the md breakpoint up.

lg.description: Span from the lg breakpoint up.

xl.description: Span from the xl breakpoint up.

xxl.description: Span from the xxl breakpoint up.

offset.description: Columns to push the column right by, from the left edge.

offsetSm.description: offset from the sm breakpoint up.

offsetMd.description: offset from the md breakpoint up.

offsetLg.description: offset from the lg breakpoint up.

offsetXl.description: offset from the xl breakpoint up.

offsetXxl.description: offset from the xxl breakpoint up.

orderSm.description: order from the sm breakpoint up.

orderMd.description: order from the md breakpoint up.

orderLg.description: order from the lg breakpoint up.

orderXl.description: order from the xl breakpoint up.

orderXxl.description: order from the xxl breakpoint up.

alignSelf.description: Cross-axis self alignment (align-self): auto, start, end, center, baseline, stretch.

tag.description: The element the column renders as.
